findings: Fall protection compliant on all elevated floors. Curtain wall crew 100% tied off. Debris netting installed below Level 22 curtain wall work. Housekeeping good throughout. PPE compliance 97% - one worker missing safety glasses in marble staging area.
corrective_actions: Issued replacement safety glasses from safety trailer. Reminded marble crew of PPE requirements. Documented.

findings: Liebherr crane annual inspection current through August 2026. Load test certification valid. All aerial lifts daily logs complete and current. Scissors lifts all have current annual inspections. Concrete mixer drum and chutes clean and operational.
corrective_actions: No corrective actions required. All documentation filed.

findings: Welding and torch activity on 4 floors. Fire watch posted on all hot work floors. Two fire watches did not have fire extinguisher immediately at work location - corrected during inspection. Hot work permits all current and posted.
corrective_actions: Fire extinguishers moved to immediate work locations. Reminded fire watch personnel of positioning requirements.

findings: Miami-Dade building inspector reviewed floors 8-10 framing and MEP rough-in. Approved for drywall. Two minor items - one missing firestop at penetration Level 9 and one HVAC duct support spacing issue Level 10. Both corrected before inspector left site.
corrective_actions: Firestop installed at Level 9 penetration. HVAC duct support added at Level 10. Both reinspected and approved same day.
